pr_description:
this 

- rewrites to TS
- supports JS and native stack
- various small improvements
- for advances uses cases you can use the new `renderButton` prop as in https://github.com/vonovak/react-navigation-header-buttons/blob/feat/ts-update/example/src/components/MaterialHeaderButton.tsx (closes #28)

BREAKING:
- requires RN 71
- renamed `OverflowMenuProvider` to `HeaderButtonsProvider` and made it required
- removes Flow typings



closes #190 
closes #191
